name: IdsEdwPcpCovRelshpIExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_in AS ( SELECT i.PCP_COV_RELSHP_SK, COALESCE(CD.TRGT_CD,'UNK') as raw_SRC_SYS_CD, i.PROV_ID, i.COV_PROV_ID, i.COV_RELSHP_PFX_ID, i.EFF_DT_SK, i.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, i.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, i.COV_PROV_SK, i.OVRD_PROV_AGMNT_SK, i.PROV_SK, i.TERM_DT_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.PCP_COV_RELSHP i LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD ON i.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD.CD_MPPNG_SK ), cte_out AS ( SELECT cte_in.PCP_COV_RELSHP_SK AS PCP_COV_RELSHP_SK, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(cte_in.raw_SRC_SYS_CD) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE dbo.trim_default(cte_in.raw_SRC_SYS_CD) END as SRC_SYS_CD, cte_in.PROV_ID as PCP_PROV_ID, cte_in.COV_PROV_ID, cte_in.COV_RELSHP_PFX_ID as PCP_COV_RELSHP_PFX_ID, cte_in.EFF_DT_SK as PCP_COV_RELSHP_EFF_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' as CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' as LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, cte_in.COV_PROV_SK, cte_in.PROV_SK as PCP_PROV_SK, cte_in.OVRD_PROV_AGMNT_SK, cte_in.TERM_DT_SK as PCP_COV_RELSHP_TERM_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} as CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} as LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM cte_in ) SELECT * FROM cte_out

Description:
COPYRIGHT 2005 BLUE CROSS/BLUE SHIELD OF KANSAS CITY 


JOB NAME:     EdwProvPcpCovRelshpExtr

DESCRIPTION:  
  Pulls data from ids and edw  
      

INPUTS:
	IDS - PCP_COV_RELSHP
  
HASH FILES:
                hf_cdma_codes         - CDMA code table - resolve code lookups
               

TRANSFORMS:  
                  TRIM all the fields that are extracted or used in lookups
                           
PROCESSING:
                  IDS - read from source, lookup all code SK values and get the natural codes
                
  

OUTPUTS: 
                    PCP_COV_RELSHP_I.dat

MODIFICATIONS:
              Oliver Nielsen  09/07/2005    Originally Programmed

Annotations:
Write PCP_COV_RELSHP Data into a Sequential file for Load Job IdsEdwPcpCovRelshpILoad.
Read all the Data from IDS PCP_COV_RELSHP Table;
Add Defaults and Null Handling.
Job Name: IdsEdwPcpCovRelshpIExtr
